competitors.name: ts-run-types (schema)
competitors.source:
() =>
    createValidate(
      RT.object({
        id: RT.number(),
        email: RT.string(),
        name: RT.string(),
        age: RT.optional(RT.number()),
        roles: RT.array(RT.union([RT.literal('admin'), RT.literal('editor'), RT.literal('user')])),
        active: RT.boolean(),
        createdAt: RT.string(),
      })
    )

competitors.name: typia
typebox
competitors.source:
c(
    Type.Object({
      id: Type.Number(),
      email: Type.String(),
      name: Type.String(),
      age: Type.Optional(Type.Number()),
      roles: Type.Array(Type.Union([Type.Literal('admin'), Type.Literal('editor'), Type.Literal('user')])),
      active: Type.Boolean(),
      createdAt: Type.String(),
    })
  )

competitors.name: zod
competitors.source:
c(z.object({
      id: z.number(),
      email: z.string(),
      name: z.string(),
      age: z.number().optional(),
      roles: z.array(z.enum(['admin', 'editor', 'user'])),
      active: z.boolean(),
      createdAt: z.string(),
    }))
